mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_ai_session (user_id, question, answer, suggestion, confidence, need_human, degraded, reason, status, ticket_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{suggestion}, #{confidence}, #{needHuman}, #{degraded}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{ticketId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

INSERT INTO ticket_ai_session_source (session_id, source_type, source_id, title, snippet, score, metadata_json, create_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{title}, #{snippet}, #{score}, #{metadataJson}, #{createTime})
INSERT INTO ticket_ai_escalation (session_id, ticket_id, user_id, user_comment, ai_summary, create_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{ticketId}, #{userId}, #{userComment}, #{aiSummary}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_ai_session SET status = 'ESCALATED', ticket_id = #{ticketId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('ACTIVE', 'RESOLVED')
